pattern: Base -2 addition mirrors ordinary carrying but a carry into a negative-weight column propagates as a negative carry, which is resolved digit by digit from the least significant end.
hints: Add the two arrays from their least significant ends like normal binary, keeping a running carry.
Because each place has weight a power of -2, producing a digit of 2 or -1 forces a carry of the opposite sign into the next place.
At each position compute the column total plus carry; the digit is that value reduced modulo 2 to {0,1}, and the carry to the next place is the negated quotient.

edge_inputs.description: two single ones produce a longer answer
different lengths with carries crossing the boundary

stress.description: random valid negabinary numbers (no leading zeros) of varied lengths
stress.note: leading digit forced to 1 for multi-digit numbers to satisfy the no-leading-zero rule
